config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmSanPhamAdd3, frmSanPhamAdd2
Nút WinForms gốc: Sao chép sản phẩm · Đóng · Lưu · Sao chép thông tin sản phẩm
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_HINHANH_GET, TR_HINHANH_INSERT, TR_HINHANH_UPDATE, TR_NGUYENLIEU_NGUKIM_DELETE, TR_NGUYENLIEU_NGUKIM_GETMASP, TR_NGUYENLIEU_NGUKIM_INSERT, TR_NGUYENLIEU_TEM_DELETE, TR_NGUYENLIEU_TEM_GETMASP, TR_NGUYENLIEU_TEM_INSERT, TR_NGUYENLIEU_VATTU_DELETE, TR_NGUYENLIEU_VATTU_GETMASP, TR_NGUYENLIEU_VATTU_INSERT, TR_NGUYENLIEU_VENNER_DELETE, TR_NGUYENLIEU_VENNER_GETMASP, TR_NGUYENLIEU_VENNER_INSERT, TR_SANPHAM_COMMON_INSERT, TR_SANPHAM_EditCode, TR_SANPHAM_NHAMAY_GET, TR_SANPHAM_NHAMAY_GETALL, TR_SANPHAM_NHAMAY_GETBYSTATUS, TR_SANPHAM_NHOM_NGUYENLIEU_INSERT, TR_SANPHAM_UPDATE_MASP, TR_SANPHAM_YEUCAU_KHACHHANG_DELETE, TR_SANPHAM_YEUCAU_KHACHHANG_GETALL, TR_SANPHAM_YEUCAU_KHACHHANG_INSERT, TR_SANPHAM_NHAMAY_GETBYHEHANG
